sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 13.8 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.13)

statement.latex: (B.\,Hartley). Is it true that a locally soluble periodic group has a finite normal series with locally nilpotent factors if it contains an element [r]{ a)} with finite centralizer? [r]{b)} with Chernikov centralizer? [ANSWERED] a) Yes, it is true (E.\,Khukhro, to appear in Bull. London Math. Soc., 2025, ).

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory VI_BRIDGING; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
